stemHtml: An aircraft is flying on a track of 060° directly towards his/her planned destination aerodrome. After establishing communication with an ATC radar unit, the pilot is instructed to “Turn right heading one five zero degrees for identification”. He/she should…

options.a: Press the IDENT button on your transponder and maintain your present track, because identification will be provided by your SSR transponder.
options.b: Turn right by 150° onto a magnetic heading of 210° and maintain the current settings on your transponder.
options.c: Turn right onto a magnetic heading of 150° and maintain the current settings on your transponder.
options.d: Turn right onto a magnetic heading of 150° and press the IDENT button on your transponder.
